description.value: Aura moderate divination; CL 9th; Slot none; Price 19,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This squat, golden idol looks like a bald, obese wise man with an extra eye in his forehead. It can be used once per day to gain information as with an augury spell, and once per day as a divination spell. Once per week, a single yes-or-no question can be asked of it (as with a commune spell). The answers do not come from a deity, but instead from insights granted by celestial movements and conjunctions; a sample insight might be, âBecause Aballon and Eox are in conjunction in the House of the Eagle, the answer is yes.â CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item, augury, commune, divination; Cost 9,500 gp.
